data.body: B2 depends on the batch-runner seam designed in docs/design/batch-runner-seam.md (B1). Under that design B2 plan-review workflow batch step is declarative: prompt=plan-review-finder, criteria=registry-assembled entries each with an optional overlay predicate, plus a model_ladder; usd_budget optional (runner computes plan_budget_cap from the reconstructed PlanContext). The interpreter resolves overlay inclusion before the runner. See the design notes B2-batch-step section.
